QuestAcceptedText: Quest %1 has been greenlit. Proceed to assigned objectives.
QuestCompletedText: All directives for Quest %1 have been executed successfully.
QuestCanceledText: Quest %1 has been aborted by command.
QuestTurnInText: Quest %1 has concluded. Report filed successfully.
QuestObjectiveCompletedText: Objective %1 under Quest %2 has been completed.
QuestCooldownText: Command is reassigning Quest %1. Return in %1.
QuestNotInGroupText: This assignment requires coordinated team deployment. Join a group to proceed.
QuestNotGroupOwnerText: Only the team leader may authorize this Quest.
